illegal_action: Submit while the internal submit queue is full.
expected_response: Submit-reject completion with ERR_QUEUE_FULL or reject-overflow accounting.
Submit-reject completion with ERR_SUBMIT_BLOCKED and no accepted descriptor.

illegal_action: Attempt maintenance write while DMA has active context.
expected_response: Maintenance write reject; source memory remains unchanged.

illegal_action: Start a maintenance op while another maintenance op is busy.
expected_response: MEM_OP_STATUS.op_reject_busy is set and active op is undisturbed.

illegal_action: Start parity injection while maintenance op is busy.
expected_response: MEM_INJECT_STATUS.reject_busy is set and active op is undisturbed.

illegal_action: Consume a parity-bad source word through DMA.
expected_response: Runtime-error completion with ERR_MEM_PARITY and zero retired words.

illegal_action: Attempt unavailable-domain DMA submission in CRYPTO_ONLY.
expected_response: Blocked-submission reject path; descriptor not accepted.

illegal_action: Cross a power transition while link backpressure is active.
expected_response: No isolation/resume violation and traffic recovers cleanly.
